div.p: Rule: After advance() consumes first char, call peek() — consume second only if match

Legend 🟦 Root node — character just consumed by advance() 🟨 Decision diamond — peek() inspects next char WITHOUT consuming 🟩 YES branch — _match(ch) consumes char, updates position, returns true 🟥 NO branch — _match(ch) returns false, cursor UNCHANGED 🟫 Emit node — _make_token() called; lexeme = source[start:current] 🔴 ILLEGAL path (dashed red) — emitting token BEFORE peek() check violates maximal munch; only for !: standalone is an ERROR token
